overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a walk through a futuristic dystopian city. The player moves from a main street with tall glass buildings into a narrow graffiti-covered alleyway, descends into a dark underpass, and emerges back onto an upper level pedestrian plaza.

scene_state.functional_zone: futuristic city street with glass office towers

agents.ego_description: walking along the city sidewalk past pedestrians and parked vehicles

notable_agents.action: walking in the opposite direction along the sidewalk

large illuminated advertisement screen on building facade
paved road with yellow grid markings and vehicle traffic
wide pedestrian walkway with red and gray paving stones

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a wide futuristic city street with towering glass buildings under an overcast sky. The camera moves forward along the sidewalk, passing pedestrians and approaching the entrance to a narrow alleyway between buildings.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow service alley with graffiti-covered walls

events.description: turning left and entering narrow alleyway from main street

agents.ego_description: navigating through the narrow alley between tall buildings

notable_agents.action: walking away from camera deeper into the alley

entered.detail: tall concrete walls with red and gray industrial finish
colorful street art and tags covering the wall surfaces
green military-style vehicle parked along the alley wall
scattered debris and garbage bags along the wall base

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions into a narrow enclosed alleyway with graffiti-covered walls and scattered trash. The camera moves forward past a parked green SUV, with industrial overhead structures visible above and pedestrians visible in the distance.

events.description: beginning descent down concrete stairs into lower level

agents.ego_description: walking down the concrete stairs into a lower industrial level

entered.detail: wide concrete staircase descending between graffiti-covered walls
exposed utility pipes and conduits running along the wall
elevated pedestrian bridge connecting buildings above

segments.scene_description: The camera descends a concrete stairwell flanked by graffiti-covered walls and industrial infrastructure. Overhead walkways and exposed pipes frame the descent into the lower level of the city structure.

scene_state.functional_zone: dark underpass tunnel with parked vehicles

events.description: entering dark tunnel area with artificial ceiling lighting
turning around to head back toward stairs

agents.ego_description: walking through the dark underpass and turning to explore the area

notable_agents.action: figure crouching or sitting near the wall in the shadows

entered.detail: large concrete archway leading into the dark underpass
thick support columns with yellow safety stripes at base
vehicles parked in the dimly lit tunnel with red taillights visible

segments.scene_description: The segment moves through a dark underpass tunnel with artificial lighting, concrete pillars, and parked vehicles. The camera explores the area, revealing a figure in the shadows before turning to head back toward the stairs.

scene_state.functional_zone: upper level pedestrian plaza with modern architecture

events.description: beginning ascent up concrete stairs to upper level
exiting stairs into open pedestrian plaza area

agents.ego_description: climbing stairs and emerging onto an upper level plaza

notable_agents.action: person sitting on concrete bench looking at device

entered.detail: wide staircase leading upward with metal railings
open pedestrian walkway with tiled flooring and planters
contemporary building with glass entrance and illuminated signage
integrated seating along the planter walls

segments.scene_description: The camera ascends the stairs from the dark underpass into a brighter upper-level pedestrian plaza. The environment transitions to a cleaner, more maintained area with modern buildings, benches, and a few pedestrians resting or walking.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a wide, futuristic city street down into a gritty urban underbelly before returning to a polished pedestrian plaza. It begins by moving along a sidewalk flanked by towering glass buildings under an overcast sky, steadily approaching the mouth of a narrow alleyway. As the camera enters the alley, the environment shifts to an enclosed space of graffiti-covered walls and scattered trash, passing a parked green SUV before descending a concrete stairwell framed by exposed pipes and industrial infrastructure. The scene then plunges into a dark underpass tunnel lit by artificial lights and concrete pillars, where the camera explores the shadows among parked vehicles before turning back toward the stairs. Finally, the camera ascends from the gloom into a bright, well-maintained upper-level plaza characterized by modern buildings and resting pedestrians.
